name: PSG Group Ltd
summary: PSG Group Ltd, an investment holding company, engages in the banking, education, financial services, and food and related businesses in South Africa and internationally. It operates through seven segments: Capitec, PSG Konsult, PSG Alpha, Zeder, Curro, Dipeo, and PSG Corporate. The company provides retail and business banking solutions; and funeral insurance covers; wealth and asset management, financial planning, insurance, stockbroking and portfolio management, and estate and trust advisory services; and investment management and treasury services. It also operates private schools; and invests in selected growth sectors. The company was formerly known as PAG Ltd. PSG Group Ltd was founded in 1995 and is based in Stellenbosch, South Africa.
